import Icon from "./Icon"; import PrimaryButton from "./PrimaryButton"; import { useVitalPulse } from "../context/VitalPulseContext"; export default function Topbar({ titleAction, onOpenNav }) { const { currentUser, signOut } = useVitalPulse(); return (
{titleAction}
VC
{currentUser?.username || "VitalPulse Console"} {currentUser?.role || "Guest session"}
Log out
); }
